issues.title: Enemy deals 54 damage (100% of 54 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: During enemy turn (seq 420), the player took 54 damage, which is 100.0% of their 54 HP at the time. Floor 6, encounter 2, turn 19.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.title: HP crashes from 100 to 0 in single encounter on floor 6
issues.description: During encounter 2 on floor 6, player HP went from a high of 100 to 0, an unfun swing of 100 HP in one encounter.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage mitigation or split boss damage over more turns

issues.title: 5 consecutive encounters with >90% HP remaining (floors 5-6)
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP ([95, 93, 91, 97, 95]) across 5 consecutive encounters (F5E0, F5E1, F5E2, F6E0, F6E1). The game may lack challenge in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid encounters to maintain tension

issues.title: F3E0 takes 7 turns (prev floor avg: 2.7, 2.6x)
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 3 against crystal_golem (common) took 7 turns to resolve, which is 2.6x the average of 2.7 turns from floor 2. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 2 and floor 3; reduce crystal_golem HP or damage

issues.title: F3E2 takes 9 turns (prev floor avg: 2.7, 3.4x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 against magma_core (boss) took 9 turns to resolve, which is 3.4x the average of 2.7 turns from floor 2. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 2 and floor 3; reduce magma_core HP or damage

issues.title: F6E2 takes 19 turns (prev floor avg: 5.0, 3.8x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 against knowledge_golem (boss) took 19 turns to resolve, which is 3.8x the average of 5.0 turns from floor 5. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 5 and floor 6; reduce knowledge_golem HP or damage
